title: Ubiquiti RocketDish 30dBi, 5GHz, Rocket Kit
description: Ubiquiti RocketDish RD-5G30 is a 2x2 parabolic antenna suitable for long PtP coupled using Rocket M units. It also comes with waterproof accessories for connection to the Rocket M5 unit Thanks to the built-in mounting system of the so-called rocket kit, any Rocket unit can be directly mounted on this antenna without the need for additional accessories. Simply click the Rocket and you're done
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,4 F/B ratio [dB] 34 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 35 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 5 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 5 Antenna type Directional Antenna gain [dBi] 30 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA female
